question: What is the prerequisite for applying a Class B UAPL?

options.text: Must hold a valid Class A UAPL.
Must hold a valid UABT and Class A UAPL.
Must hold a valid UABT and Class A UAPL with at least 1 year of UA piloting experience.
Must hold a valid Class A UAPL with at least 1 year of UA piloting experience.
